'''Delrakkin City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]]. As of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was occupied by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
